course.title: VOA English in a Minute: No Brainer

segments.text: Welcome to English in a Minute!
We have to use our brains to think.
So, what does the expression ‘no-brainer’ mean?

translations.zh-Hans: 那么，短语“no-brainer”是什么意思呢？

segments.text: Hey, did you watch the new episode of Catch a Criminal?

translations.zh-Hans: 嘿，你看《抓捕罪犯》的最新一集了吗？

segments.text: Yeah, but it was such a no-brainer!

translations.zh-Hans: 看了，不过答案实在太显而易见了！

segments.text: The police found a gun and all the money in David’s house!

translations.zh-Hans: 警察在 David 家里找到了枪和所有的钱！

segments.text: Well, what if David has a twin brother who lives with him?

translations.zh-Hans: 可是，如果 David 有个和他住在一起的双胞胎兄弟呢？

segments.text: The police would know if David had a twin brother.

translations.zh-Hans: 如果 David 有个双胞胎兄弟，警察会知道的。

segments.text: Well, what if they don’t know?
Then they are really bad at their jobs!

translations.zh-Hans: 那他们的工作做得也太差了！

segments.text: A no-brainer is something that requires little thought or is obvious.

translations.zh-Hans: no-brainer 指的是几乎不需要思考，或者答案显而易见的事情。

segments.text: It also means it is easy to make the right choice.

translations.zh-Hans: 它也表示很容易作出正确的选择。

segments.text: And that’s English in a Minute!
